user.title: Connect to Cozify HUB
user.description: Enter your Cozify HUB local IP address and the hub token from the Cozify app.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Cozify HUB. Check the IP address and port.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid hub token. Please check your token in the Cozify app.

abort.already_configured: This Cozify HUB is already configured.
